title: Explain a misunderstanding
subtitle: Say what went wrong and fix it.
overview: Use pensé que, entendí que, en realidad.

items.es: Pensé que la reunión era a las tres.
items.en: I thought the meeting was at three.

items.es: Entendí que teníamos que esperar fuera.
items.en: I understood that we had to wait outside.

items.es: En realidad, la entrada estaba en otra calle.
items.en: Actually, the entrance was on another street.
I think there was a misunderstanding.

items.es: Ahora está claro, gracias por explicarlo.
items.en: Now it is clear, thank you for explaining it.
